pre_game.message: Hey, I'm G. It’s getting a little tense in here, so I figured I’d come say hi—what's your story?
Nice to meet you, G. I'm D. It definitely is tense. I'm just here to try and win something for my family back home. What about you?
I hear you. I'm in the same boat—really just want to win enough to take care of the people I love back home.
Glad we're on the same page. It's the best motivation there is, honestly. You have a big family back home?
Not huge, just a few people who mean the world to me. How about you—big crew or a small circle?
Pretty small circle, but they’re my whole world. It definitely makes the pressure feel real.
I feel that. It's a lot of weight on your shoulders, but at least we both know exactly why we're here.
Definitely. It makes it a lot easier to stay focused when you know what's at stake.
For sure. It’s good to know I'm not the only one here with that kind of drive.
Same here. It's been good talking to you, G. Good luck with everything.
Thanks, D. Good luck to you too—hope we both make them proud. See ya.

post_game.message: I'm really glad we all took our fair share of $10,000. It was a pleasure playing with you!
It was a pleasure playing with you as well, and I'm glad we reached a fair outcome together.
